# Q4 top stage — top exfil hosts by bytes out with pct (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q4 top stage — top exfil hosts by bytes out with pct.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | top 5 bytes_out by host top_count as cnt, top_percent as pct
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 18). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
